items.name: MPEZ – Apprentices – 72 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MPEZ Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 72 Graduate & Technical Apprentice Posts
basic_details.short_information: MPEZ Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 72 vacancies across Madhya Pradesh. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MPEZ website, mpez.co.in.
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice & Technical (Diploma) Apprentice (under Apprentices Act, 1961)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (Application form to be downloaded from www.mpez.co.in and submitted by post or in person) + Mandatory NATS portal registration

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical / Civil / IT / CSE), B.Com., or Diploma (Electrical / Civil Engineering) from a Government-recognized institution, passed between 2022 and 2026.

selection_process: Merit-based on aggregate percentage marks in qualifying degree/diploma + Medical fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in offline mode. Applications submitted before 25-05-2026 or after 25-06-2026 (5:30 PM) will not be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily register and complete 100% profile on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) and obtain a valid Apprentice Registration Number. Detailed instructions for Registration, Profile Completion, and Apply for Establishment are available at https://nats.education.gov.in/assets/manual/student_manual.pdf.
seo_tags: Madhya Pradesh Poorv Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company Apprentices Recruitment 2026

items.name: MPEZ – ITI Trade Apprentice – 150 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MPEZ ITI Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: MPEZ Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 150 vacancies for ITI Trade Apprentice posts. Eligible candidates with ITI Pass can apply online from 25-05-2026 to 25-06-2026 through the official MPEZ website, mpez.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Mukhya Mahaprabandhak (Manav Sansadhan Evam Prashasan), MPEZ
basic_details.post_name: ITI Trade Apprentice - One Year (under Apprentices Act, 1961)

qualification.education_qualification: Class 10th (Dasvin) pass AND ITI certificate (NCVT / SCVT) in the relevant trade from a recognized institution. Trade-wise qualification: COPA trade – 1-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT); Stenographer Hindi – 1-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT); Electrician – 2-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT).

selection_process: Merit-based on ITI total percentage marks (Category-wise, Trade-wise) + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily complete 100% Apprentice profile registration on the NAPS portal. Instructional videos for Registration and Profile Completion are available at: https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ → Instructional Video → Candidate. Candidates must note their valid Apprentice Registration Number from NAPS before proceeding.

items.name: MPPSC – Assistant Director – 71 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Assistant Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 71 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 71 Assistant Director. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 25-04-2026, and closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MPPSC website, mppsc.mp.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official website www.mppsc.mp.gov.in or www.mponline.gov.in
Step 2: Click on "Online Application" link for Assistant Director (Farmer Welfare) Examination 2026
Step 3: New candidates must first register by clicking on "New Registration"
Step 4: Provide basic details like name, father's name, date of birth, email ID, and mobile number
Step 5: Create a password and complete the registration process
Step 6: After successful registration, login using Registration ID and password
Step 7: Fill in the application form with all required details carefully
Step 8: Upload scanned photograph (passport size colored), signature, and other required documents
Step 9: Select examination center preference from the available options
Step 10: Verify all entered information thoroughly before final submission
Step 11: Submit the application form after verification
Step 12: After submission, click on "Proceed for Payment"
Step 13: Pay the application fee online through Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking/UPI
Step 14: After successful payment, application status will show "Payment Done"
Step 15: Take a printout of the submitted application form and payment receipt
Step 16: Keep the printout and payment receipt safely for future reference
Step 17: Regularly check the official website for updates regarding admit card and examination
